case_title: LARRY BUCK VS. LI CHU WANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BUCK, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, LI CHU TU, CHIN I ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED SEP-15-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, LI CHU
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WANG, LI CHU TU, CHIN I
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT WANG, LI CHU TU, CHIN I
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED SEP-15-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TU, CHIN I

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANTS APPEARED REPRESENTED BY CHESTER JENG, AGENT FOR SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S HISTORY OF FILING CASES AND THEN NOT APPEARING FOR TRIAL, IT IS RECOMMENDED IF PLAINTIFF RE-FILES THIS CASE AND THEN DOES NOT APPEAR FOR TRIAL THAT THE CASE BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE" PER PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
